message:
fix: complete root cause fixes for CPython test_int.py

Agent 1 fixes:

1. Nested class usage detection
   - Save/restore func_local_uses when entering nested classes
   - Prevents losing track of class usage in enclosing scope

2. Exception types in heterogeneous lists
   - Added ExceptionTypeId enum with integer values
   - Type inference recognizes exception names as .int
   - Codegen emits @intFromEnum(runtime.ExceptionTypeId.ValueError)

3. String concatenation in nested for loops
   - Register types for loop vars over list/tuple literals
   - Fixes string concat recognition in type inference

4. int(str_var) for unknown types
   - Added runtime.toInt() with comptime type dispatch
   - Handles strings, integers, floats, bools at runtime

test_int.py: 8 errors → 2 (dead code + overflow edge cases)
